TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Laiyi Nsgan Laiyi o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 162.27 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 70.84 km², dxgal pmblxan o 86.37 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,556, sapah o 2,230, seejiq tnpusu 7,327 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 97% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Laiyi o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: laiji nsgan laiji o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan laiji o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, kulɟalɟau , *uŋalid , pajlɟus , ʦalasi* , tɟuwaqau , silɟə*a*a* , tɟana'asija , puʦunug , tɟalɟa'a*us , takamimuɾa . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Laiyi Nsgan Laiyi o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 162.27 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 70.84 km², dxgal pmblxan o 86.37 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,556, sapah o 2,230, seejiq tnpusu 7,327 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 97% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Laiyi o niqan 7 alang ni maxal 10. 10 o, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: laiji nsgan laiji o gaga nsgan piŋtuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (pajwaŋ). pajwaŋ ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan laiji o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, kulɟalɟau , *uŋalid , pajlɟus , ʦalasi* , tɟuwaqau , silɟə*a*a* , tɟana'asija , puʦunug , tɟalɟa'a*us , takamimuɾa . pusupnjaħan patas
